prompt: A photorealistic Japanese izakaya advertisement poster in a warm, cinematic night-time mood, designed like a street-front restaurant flyer. The composition is vertical and densely layered. On the right side, a young Japanese woman with long straight dark brown to black hair, wearing a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater, stands from the waist up and holds a large frosty glass mug of golden highball with visible ice cubes in her right hand near chest level. Her pose is relaxed and inviting, looking toward the camera, with a soft nightlife ambiance. The background is a narrow traditional izakaya exterior or interior alley scene filled with warm orange lantern light, shallow depth of field, hanging wooden menu plaques with handwritten Japanese calligraphy, and a nostalgic bustling-after-work atmosphere. In the upper left, a large weathered dark wooden signboard dominates the design, with bold white brushstroke kanji reading 蓮華食堂, small hiragana above it reading れんげしょくどう, and a red brush-painted banner beneath reading 大衆居酒屋. Below that on the left-center, place a large cream-colored paper or painted panel featuring the drink special in oversized calligraphic typography: ハイボール above a huge red 198円, with small black（税込） beside the price, the numerals painted in energetic brush style. Along the far right edge, add vertical white Japanese text reading 今日も一日、おかれさまです。 Near the lower right over the woman’s torso, place a red circular stamp-like badge with white handwritten text arranged diagonally and vertically: 旨い！安い！居心地◎. Across the bottom foreground, show exactly 4 plated menu items lined up side by side on rustic ceramic dishes: 1) two glazed grilled chicken skewers with char marks, labeled 焼き鳥 盛り合わせ and priced 580円; 2) a sashimi assortment with slices of tuna, salmon, white fish, shiso leaves and wasabi, labeled お刺身 盛り合わせ and priced 780円; 3) a plate of fried chicken karaage pieces with a lemon wedge, labeled 若鶏の唐揚げ and priced 480円; 4) sliced rolled dashi omelet topped with chopped green onion and served with grated daikon, labeled 出汁巻き玉子 and priced 380円. At the bottom left, include a glowing red paper lantern graphic with black vertical text 居酒屋. Across the bottom center on a dark band, add large bold white brush lettering reading でかい！うまい！安い！ and below it smaller white text reading みんなの憩いの場、蓮華食堂へようこそ！ Add a decorative red lotus-like emblem near the top sign and another matching emblem in the bottom right corner. Use rich amber highlights, strong contrast, glossy food styling, realistic skin and drink textures, commercial poster polish, and a nostalgic Showa-inspired izakaya promotion aesthetic.
